text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you heard? 
Apparently, someone out there's 
invented a ramen vending machine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
With just a push of a button, it'll make a fresh, 
hot bowl of ramen for you anytime!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if we could get some installed back 
in Ireland? If we had an easy way to connect
with other cultures, I think more people would
show an interest in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ramen… will be a bridge between nations. 
Mm-hm♪ Doesn't that just sound lovely?
